description: This file defines and exports Zod schemas for persona-related API payload validation, including create, update, and version creation requests. It lazily initializes schemas and provides proxy objects for schema validation methods.

methods.name: _initSchemas
methods.description: Initializes and returns the concrete Zod schemas for persona API requests.

methods.name: getPersonaSchemas
methods.description: Lazily initializes and retrieves the persona schemas.

methods.name: lazySchema
methods.description: Creates a proxy object for a schema that supports safeParse and parse methods, deferring schema construction until first use.
